content: The existing Self-Refine framework for LLM code generation can be reinforced by integrating multiple inconsistent self-reflection perspectives from LLM self-reflection mechanisms, creating a multi-perspective iterative self-refinement pipeline that retains Self-Refine's key advantage of requiring no external supervision or additional training. This hybrid framework resolves the limitation of single-perspective feedback blind spots that often trap standard Self-Refine in local suboptimal output improvements.
